instructions: Write your email using all the notes.

task.subject: Our geography homework
task.initialEmail: Hi,||We have to make a poster for geography about a European city. [1]Do you think we should choose Paris?[/1]||[2]Can we meet at the library after school today?[/2] I need to use the computers there.||[3]What information should we put on the poster?[/3]||[4]Should we draw the pictures ourselves?[/4]||Write soon||Megan

sampleAnswer.text: Hi Megan,||Thanks for your email. [1]I don’t think Paris is the best choice, but maybe we could choose Barcelona because it has interesting buildings and beaches.[/1]||[2]I’m sorry, but I can’t meet at the library today because I have to go to the dentist after school.[/2]||[3]We should include information about the weather, famous places and transport, because those things will make the poster useful.[/3]||[4]In my opinion, we should draw some pictures ourselves, but we can also print a small map from the internet.[/4]||See you tomorrow,||Josh
